name: Auto Subtitles
description: Generate subtitles for the active DaVinci Resolve timeline. Extracts audio, transcribes with Whisper, optionally translates via Gemini, and writes either an SRT track or animated Fusion macros back into the timeline.

inputs.name: target_language
inputs.label: Target language
inputs.description: Translate the transcript into this language (e.g. English, French, Spanish). Leave blank to keep the original language.

inputs.name: animation
inputs.label: Animated Fusion macros
inputs.description: If on, generates animated word-by-word Fusion macros instead of a static SRT track.

inputs.name: max_words_per_chunk
inputs.label: Max words per subtitle
inputs.description: Maximum number of words per subtitle segment. 8 is a comfortable default for most footage.

inputs.name: vad_sensitivity
inputs.label: VAD sensitivity
inputs.description: Voice Activity Detection sensitivity. Use 'high' if words are getting cut off or dropped.

inputs.name: highlight_color
inputs.label: Highlight color
inputs.description: Hex color (e.g. #FF0000) for the active word highlight when animation is on.

capabilities.description: DaVinci Resolve must be connected — this skill drives the auto-subtitles workflow.
